Value: plated thin with a sauce and arugula salad over top.
portion and pound tuna between plastic wrap and store for use.
when plating the top plastic sheet is removed and the tuna is seasoned with salt.
brush the plate with yuzu kosho dressing then place tuna over top.
fish side down, remove second plastic sheet. Add fingerlime vinegrette and finishing salt.
in a mixing bowl toss arugula, fennel and lemon supremes with yuzu kosho dressing.
place over tuna then add fried caperberries to garnish.
small clear round plate, thin layer of tuna dressed in citrus with a small salad over top.
